_meta.purpose: Minor Arcana 56 张牌 hero 生图清单（slug 索引）

hero_prompt_spec.style_alignment: scripts/generate-scenario-images.js (站点塔罗 hero 一致风格)
elements: Rider-Waite Minor 牌画面（20 张内置映射表）
花色元素色背景渐变（Wands=fire红橙 / Cups=water蓝青 / Swords=air浅黄 / Pentacles=earth绿棕）
花色符号（Wands=火焰权杖 / Cups=圣杯 / Swords=宝剑 / Pentacles=星币）
数字牌编码数字 / 宫廷牌编码角色
Eastern-inspired Tibetan 调性 + sacred geometry + deep indigo

_meta.crystal_slug_rule: 全部带 -meaning 后缀对齐 390 库（5 角色：best_overall/upright/reversed/love/daily_wear）

hero.prompt: A symbolic editorial illustration for the tarot card Queen of Wands (The Magnetic Leader) from the Minor Arcana, set in the realm of the wands suit (fire element). Central Rider-Waite imagery: a confident queen seated on an ornate throne adorned with lions and sunflowers, a wand in one hand and a sunflower in the other, a black cat of self-possession curled at her feet, a barren desert behind her. The figure carries the unmistakable presence of the queen (the The Magnetic Leader). The background is built from a warm gradient of crimson, burnt-orange and ember-red flame tones. Beside the card visual, a living flourishing wand / staff wrapped in green leaves and small salamanders glows as the suit emblem. At the base of the composition, a single Sunstone crystal gemstone placed gracefully as the recommended stone. The composition is rendered in elegant luminous golden line work with a soft glow. Rich spiritual graphic design, sacred geometry motifs, deep indigo background harmonized with the accent palette, glowing light rays, floating luminous particles, symmetrical balanced composition, mystical contemplative Eastern-inspired Tibetan gallery atmosphere, highly detailed digital art, premium editorial quality, no text, no words, no letters.
